definition: Sensing telemetry monitoring and early-warning capacity for asset condition hazards anomalies and service performance
measurement_note: Use sensor coverage data latency calibration missingness false alarm missed event and field verification indicators

definition: Capacity to convert condition data inspection records and analytics into timely repair renewal and backlog reduction
measurement_note: Use work-order completion asset condition maintenance backlog repair time inspection completion and spare-parts indicators

definition: Ability to protect operational technology control systems sensors communications and infrastructure operations from digital compromise
measurement_note: Use segmentation MFA access review incident response recovery drills OT asset inventory vendor access controls and backup tests

definition: Capacity to model assets scenarios compound hazards failure modes cascading dependencies and adaptation pathways
measurement_note: Use model validation data lineage scenario coverage sensitivity tests and after-action comparison indicators

definition: Backup capacity alternate routes manual procedures islanding safe defaults and graceful degradation for critical services
measurement_note: Use critical-function fallback tests backup duration route diversity manual operations and service-priority indicators

definition: Ability to anticipate and adapt to heat flood fire drought sea-level rise storm smoke and compound climate stress
measurement_note: Use climate exposure assessment adaptation investment nature-based buffers load forecasts and critical-service continuity indicators

definition: Public accountability procurement oversight vendor governance data rights auditability incident review and corrective action
measurement_note: Use data-rights terms vendor portability public reporting audit records procurement standards and corrective-action completion

definition: Protection of vulnerable communities accessibility environmental justice repair equity affordability and anti-displacement
measurement_note: Use disaggregated service reliability repair speed warning access affordability exposure and participation indicators

definition: Integration of watersheds wetlands green infrastructure biodiversity emissions land use and ecological buffers into infrastructure resilience
measurement_note: Use watershed health canopy coverage floodplain restoration emissions ecosystem service and habitat indicators

definition: Hidden fragility from lock-in deferred maintenance weak fallback cyber exposure data problems or brittle optimization
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger dependency review stress testing and public accountability

definition: Administrative financial technical procurement staffing legal and trust burden required to implement a strategy
measurement_note: Higher values should trigger sequencing feasibility funding and public-capacity review
